release_notes: `BrokerClient.order_fill()` (Kite + Breeze) reads back real order status, filled quantity, and average price for a placed order. Strategies built from `strategy_template.py` assumed a market order fully filled at the pre-trade quote; entries now poll the broker for the actual fill, and exits close only the quantity that actually filled instead of always closing the full requested size — previously a partial fill on entry could get flipped to an unintended opposite position on exit. `calc_pnl()` now weights each leg by its own filled quantity so mixed fill sizes across legs still net correctly. `reconciliation.reconcile()` matched broker positions to strategy state by symbol + direction only, so two strategies holding the same strike (or a partial fill) could both silently match a single broker position line even if the combined quantity didn't actually reconcile. It now sums each strategy's leg quantity per symbol before comparing to the broker's netted line.
